news.headline: BoE's Lombardelli: You wouldn't expect to see long-term structural reforms affect our forecasts

Peabody reported Q4 net income $30.6M (down from $192M last year), Adjusted EBITDA $176.7M, full-year revenue $4.2B. Advancing toward starting longwall mining in Q1 2026. Acquisition of premium hard coking coal mines reshaping company. Safety improvements noted with low accident rates. Shareholder returns $221M. Bond release approvals at $110M. Dividend of $0.075 per share declared. Segment performance and outlook details provided. Acquisition details and financial targets outlined for 2025. Earnings call scheduled for 10 am CT. Peabody is a leading coal producer focused on sustainability.
news.summary: Peabody reported fourth-quarter net income of $30.6 million, a decrease from $192.0 million in the prior year, with Adjusted EBITDA of $176.7 million in Q4 2024. Full-year 2024 revenue was $4,236.7 million compared to $4,946.7 million in the previous year, while net income attributable to common stockholders was $370.9 million, down from $759.6 million in the prior year. Peabody advanced towards acquiring premium hard coking coal operations in Australia, including the Centurion Mine. The company achieved record safety and environmental performance in 2024, including a low accident rate. They returned $221 million to shareholders, received bond release approval for $110 million, and declared a $0.075 per share dividend. They also announced a partnership with RWE for renewable projects. Peabody continues to focus on safe operations and completing the premium coal acquisition, aiming for high earnings potential and a value-creation model. The company's guidance for 2025 includes volume projections and financial metrics across its segments, emphasizing productivity, safety, and cost optimization. Peabody's transformation into a metallurgical coal producer aims for long-term growth and shareholder returns.

Skyren DAO introduces SKYRN token to simplify airdrops, combat scams, and provide easier access and tracking for users.
news.summary: Skyren DAO has developed a new way to streamline and secure the airdrop process for blockchain investors by introducing the SKYRN token. Airdrops have long been chaotic, with scams, eligibility confusion, and lack of organization hindering users from capitalizing on free rewards. Skyren DAO aims to change this narrative by providing an ecosystem where airdrop collection is predictable, accessible, and profitable. The integration of SKYRN into decentralized finance (DeFi) is reshaping how users interact with token rewards, leveraging blockchain transparency and automation. The SKYRN token acts as a gateway to premium airdrops, eliminating inefficiencies like scams, eligibility confusion, and lack of tracking tools. Skyren DAO's innovative approach is revolutionizing airdrop participation in the blockchain community.

Satoshi Nakamoto's Bitcoin holdings valued at $108 billion could surpass Bill Gates in wealth. New research shows.
news.summary: New research analyzing Satoshi Nakamoto's Bitcoin holdings suggests they could be valued at more than $108 billion, potentially surpassing the wealth of Bill Gates. This estimation highlights the significant value of the Bitcoin creator's assets in the current market.

news.headline: P2P launches early with Mbanq, serving Brazilian community in US with financial services, leveraging tech expertise.
news.summary: In Naples, Florida, P2P, a new digital finance platform designed for the Brazilian community in the United States, has launched ahead of schedule in partnership with Mbanq, a prominent player in financial technology and Embedded Finance. Utilizing Mbanq's advanced technology and regulatory knowledge, P2P now offers a range of financial services tailored to the requirements of Brazilians in the U.S. Key features include USD accounts and a customizable app. This innovative platform has been rolled out two months earlier than planned.

BoE's Bailey: We must judge in future meetings whether underlying inflation pressures are easing enough to allow further cuts
BoE's Bailey: There are risks to inflation on both sides
BoE's Bailey: It's important to a take gradual approach to easing
Distribution Solutions Group will report Q4 and fiscal year 2024 results on March 6, 2025, with a conference call at 9:00 AM EST.
news.summary: Distribution Solutions Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: DSGR), a leading distribution company, is set to release its Q4 and FY 2024 results on Thursday, March 6th, 2025, before the market opens. The Company will conduct a conference call with prepared comments starting at 9:00 a.m. ET. Investors can access additional presentation slides on the Company’s investor relations Events page at https://investor.distribu.

news.headline: Lynn University teams up with Related Ross to offer student internships and jobs in South Florida for real-world experience. Biggest developer in Palm Beach County to provide roles in various disciplines.
news.summary: A partnership has been formed between Lynn University in Boca Raton, Florida and Related Ross, a prominent organization in the area. This collaboration aims to offer valuable internship and job opportunities to students, helping them gain practical experience and readiness for their future careers in South Florida. Related Ross is a major player as the primary commercial-property owner in downtown West Palm Beach and the largest developer in Palm Beach County. The company will provide Lynn students with a variety of internships and entry-level positions spanning different disciplines. This strategic partnership will undoubtedly benefit students looking to kickstart their professional journeys in this thriving region.

news.headline: Singapore construction industry to grow by 3.3% in 2024 and 4.1% in 2025, with rising investments in various sectors.
news.summary: A recent report on the Singapore construction market, available on ResearchAndMarkets.com, indicates promising growth projections. The industry in Singapore is expected to grow by 3.3% in real terms in 2024 and further expand by 4.1% in 2025. This growth is primarily attributed to the rise in construction contracts awarded and the increasing investments in energy and utilities, infrastructure, commercial, industrial, institutional, and residential sectors. The report provides a comprehensive analysis of the market size, trends, and forecasts by different sectors, offering valuable insights for stakeholders.

news.headline: BoE's Bailey: It's unclear what form global trade policies will take
Skyren DAO introduces innovative airdrop collection mechanism utilizing SKYRN token to offer curated and verified opportunities.
news.summary: Skyren DAO, powered by the SKYRN token, aims to simplify the way users earn in the crypto world through a unique airdrop collection mechanism. Many blockchain projects offer airdrops, but the process can be chaotic and risky due to scams and unreliable sources. Skyren DAO verifies and lists legitimate airdrop opportunities on its platform, providing a structured solution that benefits both new and experienced users. The platform's automated system tracks and filters high-quality airdrops, ensuring holders of the SKYRN token access exclusive airdrop campaigns from legitimate projects. By removing uncertainty and enhancing user experience, Skyren DAO stands out with its multi-layered approach to earnings, integrating staking, governance, and automated tracking systems.

Intercontinental Exchange raises quarterly dividend by 7% to $0.48; annual dividend for 2025 expected to be $1.92 per share.
news.summary: Intercontinental Exchange (ICE), a global technology and data provider, recently approved a first quarter 2025 dividend of $0.48 per share, marking a 7% increase from the previous $0.45 per share dividend in 2024. This cash dividend will be paid on March 31, 2025, to stockholders who are recorded as such by March 17, 2025. The ex-dividend date is also March 17, 2025. ICE anticipates the total dividend for 2025 to be $1.92 per share.

Canada Goose reports fiscal Q3 2025 results ending Dec 29, 2024. CEO highlights business acceleration in December.
news.summary: Canada Goose Holdings Inc. released its financial results for the third quarter of fiscal 2025, concluding on December 29, 2024. The company trades on both the NYSE and TSX under the symbol GOOS. All figures mentioned are in Canadian dollars. CEO Dani Reiss noted the successful execution during a crucial consumer shopping period, notably in December where substantial business growth was observed. The brand experienced strong momentum during this time.

news.headline: Hershey stock drops as rising commodity prices impact profits.
Kenvue Inc. (NYSE: KVUE) reports 2024 financial results with profit despite slower sales growth.CEO confident about 2025 plans.
news.summary: Skillman, NJ - Kenvue Inc. (NYSE: KVUE) released its financial results for the fiscal fourth quarter and full year ending on December 29, 2024. Despite facing challenges that led to lower sales growth than anticipated, the company met its profit targets for 2024. CEO Thibaut Mongon stated that they are now in a stronger position to compete in 2025 due to enhanced brand investments. The company is concentrating on utilizing these investments to drive growth and achieve long-term success.

news.headline: AMC to announce Q4 and full year 2024 results on Feb 25 after market close. Webcast available. #AMC #earnings #NYSE
news.summary: AMC Entertainment Holdings, Inc. will release its financial results for Q4 and the full year ending December 31, 2024, after the market closes on February 25, 2025. As the world's largest theatrical exhibition company, AMC (NYSE: AMC) will conduct an earnings webcast available on their Investor Relations website at investor.amctheatres.com/. The announcement signifies a key milestone for the company, providing stakeholders with crucial insights into its performance during this period.

news.headline: Tapestry, Inc. (NYSE: TPR) reports strong Q2 results, ending on Dec 28, 2024. CEO credits teams for outperformance.
news.summary: In New York, Tapestry, Inc. (NYSE: TPR), known for Coach, Kate Spade, and Stuart Weitzman brands, announced its fiscal Q2 results till December 28, 2024. CEO Joanne Crevoiserat credited the remarkable performance to dedicated teams and brand development efforts, stating a significant success during the crucial holiday period.

news.headline: US Foods to present at CAGNY 2025 Conference on Feb. 20, at 11am EST. Webcast live at ir.usfoods.com.
news.summary: US Foods Holding Corp. shared that CEO Dave Flitman and CFO Dirk Locascio are scheduled to speak at the CAGNY 2025 Conference on February 20, 2025, at 11 a.m. EST. The presentation, viewable at https://ir.usfoods.com, will be live webcasted with an archived replay available post-event. US Foods aims to assist its customers with their foodservice needs. This information comes from a Rosemont-based company, traded on the NYSE under USFD.

news.headline: Yum! Brands, Inc. raises quarterly dividend by 6% to $0.71 per share.
news.summary: In the city of Louisville, Kentucky, Yum! Brands, Inc. has disclosed a 6% rise in their quarterly dividend to $0.71 per share.

news.headline: Philip Morris International reports strong 2024 results driven by IQOS and ZYN; US FDA authorizes ZYN nicotine pouches.
news.summary: In Stamford, CT, Philip Morris International Inc. (NYSE: PM) released its 2024 fourth-quarter and full-year results. CEO Jacek Olczak expressed satisfaction with the company's performance, citing significant growth due to IQOS and ZYN, along with a solid showing in combustibles. Notably, all ZYN nicotine pouches currently available in the U.S. have received FDA approval, marking a key milestone for the company. PMI's strong results in 2024 reflect its successful strategy, with a focus on innovation and diversified product offerings.

news.headline: Align Partners submitted 4 shareholder proposals at Coway Co., Ltd. in South Korea to protect minority shareholders' interests.
news.summary: In Seoul, South Korea, Align Partners Capital Management Inc. has been a shareholder of Coway Co., Ltd. since 2023. On February 6, 2025, they submitted 4 shareholder proposals for the upcoming Annual General Meeting. These proposals focus on promoting governance that benefits all stakeholders, not just the biggest shareholder. Align Partners aims to appoint Namuh Rhee, an independent expert in governance and capital markets, to support these proposals.

news.headline: Yum! Brands reported Q4 EPS of $1.49, $1.61 excluding Special Items, FY GAAP EPS of $5.22, $5.48 excluding Special Items.
news.summary: Yum! Brands, Inc. released its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year ending on December 31, 2024. In the fourth quarter, the company reported a GAAP EPS of $1.49, while EPS excluding Special Items stood at $1.61. For the full year, the GAAP EPS was $5.22, with EPS excluding Special Items at $5.48, showing a 6% increase. CEO David Gibbs expressed satisfaction with the significant core operating profit growth achieved in 2024 despite challenges in the consumer landscape. The company remains optimistic about its performance based on these results.
